Porsche 911 Turbo Invitational

Porsche and Rocket League teamed up to bring the Porsche 911 to the game, and kicked it all off with a flashy $50,000 tournament.

  • Animation Direction
  • Broadcast Design
  • Announcement Trailer

Design

Vibrant colors accent a glitchy cyberpunk motion texture for a visual feast of a broadcast.

Taking direction from the Rocket League art team’s seasonal branding, I crafted a looping visual glitch to serve as the background visual for this high energy tournament design. To create cohesion, this visual texture was used across various broadcast screens and event social media alike.

Animation

A high-concept 3D announcement trailer to kick off a high-octane event.

With just a few weeks to put together an announcement trailer, I crafted a 3D animation concept that featured the Porsche 911 Turbos kicking off a 2v2 match as the ball drops into the arena, while highlighting the iconic Porsche emblem on the cars. Although time constraints ultimately wouldn't allow for the completion of this animation in time for the event, this unfinished concept represents my original vision for the video.

Broadcast Design

Extending the high-energy style into every corner of the broadcast was our goal, ensuring the visual experience carried seamlessly from social media to the live event.

Each screen was carefully crafted to maintain the sleek yet edgy vibe that fit both Porsche’s brand and Rocket League’s audience. A custom overlay, integrated with the Rocket League API, allowed for real-time updates and live stats, blending dynamic visuals with crucial game information to keep fans fully engaged in the action.

Credits

  • Design: Mateo Julia-Wise

Fortnite Reunion

Let's Connect!

If you’re interested in collaborating, please fill out this quick form to help me get the big picture of your project. Don't skimp on details - the more specific you can be, the better!

I prioritize projects that feel like a great fit, but as long as you have a serious inquiry I will get back to you. I'm especially enthusiastic about collaborating on projects that prioritize social impact and humanitarian efforts. If your work aims to promote equality and tackle social issues, I would love to connect and explore how we can work together.

I enjoy having my creative capabilities challenged. If you don't see an exact example of what you're looking for within my portfolio, don't let that dissuade you. Research and development are my forte, and I have a knack for finding creative solutions to problems. If you'd like to just send me a friendly message, shoot me an email!
